description: You are the Head of Customer Support Operations at Horizon Digital, a fast-growing SaaS company. The previous manager left the helpdesk in disarray. Log in at http://localhost:8080 with admin@helpdesk.local / Admin123! to audit and clean up the system. Move the two sales/partnership inquiries currently in 'Technical Support' to 'Sales Inquiries', and move the billing/account issue in 'Sales Inquiries' to 'Customer Success'. Update agent permissions so Raj Patel (raj.patel@helpdesk.local) only has access to 'Technical Support' and Ben Harris (ben.harris@helpdesk.local) has access to both 'Sales Inquiries' and 'Customer Success'. Assign all unassigned conversations in 'Technical Support' to Raj Patel and all unassigned conversations in 'Customer Success' to Nina Kovacs (nina.kovacs@helpdesk.local). Create a saved reply named 'Sales Inquiry Acknowledgment' with the body: 'Thank you for reaching out to our sales team! A dedicated account executive will review your inquiry and respond within 1 business day. In the meantime, feel free to browse our pricing page for detailed plan information.' Finally, create a tag named 'needs-follow-up' and apply it to every conversation in the 'Sales Inquiries' mailbox that has not yet received an agent reply.
